# MCP Server Directory Scan — June 28, 2026 (Evening Sweep)
## mcpservers.org homepage — 7 new servers found since afternoon sweep

---

## SOURCE: mcpservers.org SSR Data

### Methodology
- Extracted from mcpservers.org homepage SSR payload (latest servers array)
- Identified 7 servers NOT in our catalog (checked against index.md)
- mcp.so was unavailable (Cloudflare blocking — no new data from that source)
- mcpservers.org sitemaps dated June 27 (stale)

---

## NEW BUSINESS-RELEVANT SERVERS

### 1. Neuron ★ New
- **Category:** Communication / Marketing
- WhatsApp automation platform with 120+ MCP tools for AI chatbots, broadcasts, campaigns, contact management, knowledge bases, and newsletters
- Website: neuron.ng
- Business relevance: WhatsApp is the #1 messaging platform for business in LATAM, India, SEA. First MCP-native WhatsApp marketing platform — huge for operators in WhatsApp-first markets.

### 2. StartupKit ★ New
- **Category:** Marketing / Business Infrastructure
- Agent-native MCP+CLI platform for business infrastructure — domain search, SEO analytics, keyword research, Google Trends, and app store intelligence
- GitHub: github.com/01-studio/startupkit
- Business relevance: All-in-one business research toolkit for operators launching or scaling products. Combines domain/SEO/trends/app-store intelligence in one MCP server.

### 3. HumanTone ★ New
- **Category:** Content / Productivity
- Official MCP server for HumanTone. Humanize AI-generated text and check AI likelihood directly from Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, and other MCP clients.
- GitHub: github.com/HumanTone/humantone-mcp
- Business relevance: AI content humanization for operators who use AI-generated content but need it to pass as human-written. Growing category as AI content detection becomes standard.

### 4. mailcue-mcp ★ New
- **Category:** Communication
- Give AI agents their own local mailbox to read, send, and triage email via MCP.
- GitHub: github.com/Olib-AI/mailcue
- Business relevance: Email automation for AI agents — lightweight alternative to full Gmail/Outlook MCP servers. Good for operators who want agent-driven email without heavy OAuth setup.

### 5. MyLinedChart Chart Context ★ New
- **Category:** Finance / Trading
- Read-only MCP server giving AI agents access to live MyLinedChart desktop workspace — chart context, candles, drawings, indicators, and IBKR connection status. Local, private, read-only.
- GitHub: github.com/none298-dotcom/mylinedchart-mcp-chart-context
- Business relevance: Trading/charting intelligence for operators who use MyLinedChart and Interactive Brokers. First MCP bridge for this trading platform.

### 6. Fahali ★ New
- **Category:** Finance / Market Intelligence
- Market intelligence your AI agent can call via MCP.
- GitHub: github.com/BobMain-2025/fahali-mcp
- Business relevance: Market intelligence data for operators making investment or competitive decisions.

### 7. E-commerce Fashion Market Analysis ★ New
- **Category:** E-Commerce / Marketing
- Fashion vertical MCP server — SEO audits, trend analysis, competitor monitoring, and ad copy generation for fashion e-commerce. Includes 12 playbook skills for AI agents.
- GitHub: github.com/alexgenovese/ecommerce-fashion-market-analysis
- Business relevance: Vertical-specific MCP for fashion e-commerce operators. First fashion-industry MCP server combining SEO, trends, and competitor intelligence.

- **Vertical-specific MCPs growing**: Fashion e-commerce MCP shows industry specialization trend
- **Business infrastructure MCPs**: StartupKit combines domain/SEO/trends in one agent-native toolkit
